name: Household
description: Residential property, home contents, and personal liability coverage bundled for European households

content.description: Bundled residential insurance combining dwelling coverage, personal property protection, and homeowner liability. This European-market product covers fire, water damage, storm, theft, and glass breakage for private residences. Personal liability covers third-party bodily injury and property damage arising from daily activities. Household policies in continental Europe typically follow an all-risks or named-perils format with regional variations for natural hazard exposure.
content.productExamples: Dwelling fire, Home contents, Personal liability, Glass breakage, Natural hazards, Tenant liability
